feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1864 201 1663 81
US 1721 176 1545 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Dungeon Survival
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Barrel of Gems：$4.99
  • Sack of Gems：$0.99
  • Gift of the King：$14.99
  • The Dragon Queen's treasure：$29.99
  • Diamond Treasury：$99.99

Application Description

[*] Game Features - Cave levels are randomly generated, providing a new experience each time you play! - Hundreds of monsters to defeat! - Hundreds of equipment to collect! - Hundreds of quests and achievements to conquer! - Enchant, Reform, Level up, and collect Gold! An abundant new world to explore! [*] Back Story Black Haze is a border town renown for its rich mineral deposits, which has fallen on hard times of late. In this city, it is difficult to tell the difference between good and evil. Following the mysterious disappearance of the former lord, the fragile balance of the city is disrupted. You are Royde, and you have been chosen by the king to bring balance back to Black Haze and investigate the strange reports that have come from the city. [*] Battle & Classes - 9 classes, each with unique skills. Build your party however you choose. - Intricate turn-based combat lets you become the master of the battlefield - Characters develop traits that can help or hinder. You must decide how to use them. [*] Maps & Monsters - Follow the story or venture off on your own to bring your enemies to justice. - Challenging enemies will keep you on your toes. Do not underestimate them or it will mean your destruction. - Rare and powerful enemies will challenge you. Defeat them to collect precious loot and prove your valor. [*] Contact Us Please contact us with any question, suggestions, concern, or advice! Support Email: 54276264@qq.com FACEBOOK: https://goo.gl/zPtps1

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Demumu: Are You Dead?
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$0.99 ~ $6.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

A lightweight safety tool crafted for solo dwellers, establishing invisible safety protection through check-in monitoring and emergency contact mechanisms to make solitary life more reassuring · Automatic Notification for Unchecked-In Days · Set up one emergency contact (family member or friend) in advance. If you haven’t checked in via the app for consecutive days, the system will automatically send an email to them the next day to promptly convey safety anomalies and gain critical intervention time for potential risks · Effortless Setup & Use · No registration or login required. Simply enter the contact’s name and email to complete setup on first use. Tap to check in daily, with the background automatically monitoring your status without disturbing daily routines to ensure easy and convenient operation · Strict Privacy Protection · Uses encryption technology to safeguard emergency contact information and check-in records. Refuses to collect irrelevant permissions like location, eliminating privacy leakage risks and ensuring personal information security for trustworthy safety guardianship · For All Solo Dwellers · Whether you’re a solo office worker, a student living away from home, or anyone choosing a solitary lifestyle, Demumu serves as your safety companion: daily check-ins signal safety, while abnormal situations trigger early notifications to give those who care about you peace of mind and add a layer of protection for yourself Alone but not lonely, safety by your side. Protect every solitary moment with simple solutions and build a solid safety line for solo living User Agreement: https://Moonscape.cc/Demumu/UserAgreement.html Privacy Policy: https://Moonscape.cc/Demumu/PrivacyPolicy.html Official Email: Demumuofficial@nexun.vip Demumu Team

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Solar Arc – Sun & Moon Tracker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → Free [Free ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not. - Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts. - Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance. - Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen. SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel. ARC MODE The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together. GRADIENT MODE Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day. LUNAR TRACKING Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be. 52-WEEK FORECAST What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit. FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot. Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around. Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it. Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today. Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you. FEATURES - Live gradient line and arc visualizations - Sun view, moon view, or dual view - Golden hour and blue hour timing - Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination - 52-week forecast for any date - Five activity modes - Medium and large home screen widgets - Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour - Multi-location with automatic timezone handling - Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms - Fully offline. No tracking. No account required. WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR? Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are. -- One purchase. No subscription. No ads. Yours forever. Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

entry.title: EarthBeat - Schumann Resonance
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Yearly Subscription：$8.99 → $6.99 [$3.99 ~ $8.99]

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

In-App Purchases

  • Yearly Subscription：$6.99
  • Monthly Subscription：$1.99

Application Description

"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration." -Nikola Tesla KEY FEATURES: - Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app - Customizable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center - Real-time aurora prediction with full map view - Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro) - Advanced burst analysis and notifications (EarthBeat Pro) - Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro) - Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro) - Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages) Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity. EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) data. The GCP displays as a 3D colored indicator reflecting global consciousness patterns. Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP Dot Widget displays consciousness patterns. New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom. EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, and 10-week archive for tracking patterns. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development. Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields. Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian. If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch. All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app. Privacy Policy: https://asv.pt/earthbeat-privacy-policy/ Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Balatro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

Application Description

Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game! Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before! Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands. Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game. Features: * Remastered controls for touch screen devices. * Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run. * Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores. * Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play. * Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Kingdom Rush Vengeance TD Game
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Hero Tank：$5.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $5.99]

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tower War Zepelling：$4.99
  • Tower Wicked Sisters：$2.99
  • Tower Swamp Monster：$2.99
  • Tower Ignis Altar：$0.99
  • Tower Shaolin Temple：$0.99
  • Tower Rotten Forest：$0.99
  • Tower Blazing Watcher：$2.99
  • Tower Deep Devils Reef：$0.99
  • Hero Tank：$3.99
  • Hero Tramin：$2.99

Application Description

Get ready to jump into action and show the Kingdom who’s the real boss in the best tower defense game! Face empires of mighty enemies. Clash against supreme bosses, unlocking and switching to new towers. Train legendary heroes and get all the achievements using your strategy in this amazing TD game. Kingdom Rush Vengeance will give you hours and hours of gameplay in the best tower defense game available! Heroes, your Army, Enemies, and legendary td bossfights! - 17 Powerful HEROES who will, without hesitation, rush into action at your command - LEVEL UP YOUR HEROES and upgrade their abilities - 10+ TRINKETS AND ARTEFACTS for that extra action in battle. - NEW POWERS AND REINFORCEMENTS to vanquish your foes, td style! - 30 UPGRADES to train your army to their best form. - 60+ DEADLY ENEMIES that will put all of your wit and strategic skills to the test - RUSH TO SAVE THE KINGDOM as you bring down 6 mighty bosses in the most legendary boss fights! Epic Selection of Towers and Upgrades - 22 NEW TOWERS to defend your kingdom - UNIQUE ABILITIES AND SPECIAL POWER for every tower - Choose your arsenal of towers and execute your strategy. Create devastating combinations of towers, abilities and special powers to stop your enemies! Near Endless Tower Defense Gameplay - 42 CHALLENGING STAGES that will test your skills - 9 DIFFERENT REALMS to conquer and explore - EXPLORE new lands in the Kingdom - 60+ ACHIEVEMENTS, hidden secrets, and fun stuff for you to play and discover while you explore the realm! - UNLOCK HEROIC AND IRON CHALLENGES on all stages - CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERAN OR IMPOSSIBLE difficulty for every level - Summon enemy waves faster to earn additional gold Time for some Royal Vengeance in the Kingdom! Vez’nan, the powerful almighty wizard has returned. Lead your powerful dark army and make the Kingdom tremble with each step. Help Vez’nan conquer new lands in the kingdom! Orcs, goblins, demons, dark knights, zombies, and many more! Choose your favorites and mix them to find the most deadly tower defense combination - secure the crown of the kingdom for Vez’nan. Awesome Offline Tower Defense Game No Wi-Fi at your Dark Tower? - PLAY ANYWHERE - playing offline works, if your wifi doesn’t - PLAY OFFLINE - no internet connection required - You can play Kingdom Rush Vengeance as your offline TD game of choice. -------------------------------------------------- HEARD ON THE MEDIA: "For veteran Kingdom Rush players and newcomers alike, the charm and strategy of the franchise remains with Kingdom Rush: Vengeance, making it one of the best mobile games of 2018!" -Polygon "Kingdom Rush Vengeance is the biggest and baddest the series has been." -148Apps "Players with any affinity for tower-defense games are going to enjoy every second they spend with Kingdom Rush Vengeance!" -Pocket gamer "The game is intensely engaging with a light-hearted tone that makes it a real pleasure to jump into." -Pocket tactics Get Lord Vez’nan’s latest news here: https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/ Terms and Conditions: https://www.ironhidegames.com/TermsOfService Privacy Policy: https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy Video creators, podcast creators, and streamers: We would love to see your content on Youtube and Twitch! We support and promote channel creators so, if you want us to showcase your videos or want to know more about our games, feel free to write to us to contact@ironhidegames.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Meridian 157: Chapter 3
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

You have ventured this far, now there is no turning back. Uncover the island’s dark history by travelling through crumbling caverns and mysterious laboratories, but be warned, some may not be too welcoming of your presence… The epic conclusion to the Meridian 157 series has arrived! Follow Dr. Zander into the heart of the facility to discover the sinister purpose behind the FLARE project, and to avert the impending disaster brought on by its conception. With the most unique puzzles of the series, Meridian 157: Chapter 3 takes you to the source of the anomaly through a thrilling journey of mind-bending enigmas, perilous exploration and unsettling secrets of the island’s previous inhabitants. Follow Dr. Zander as he is pushed to his wits-end in this final adventure. Features: • The final and longest chapter in the Meridian 157 storyline! • The most unique and challenging puzzles to date • Immersive graphics • Custom ambient soundtrack • A logical two tier hint system • Available in 9 different languages • Color blind mode

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Meridian 157: Chapter 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

In both a figurative and literal sense, forensic meteorologist David Zander has hit rock bottom. Trapped deep underground on a lost and forgotten island, David’s priority shifts from finding answers about the mystery surrounding him, to surviving the crisis he now finds himself trapped in. It’s now up to you to find an escape from the madness of meridian 157, but be warned, as escape may not come so easily. Will David find the answers he searched so hard for, or will his efforts all be in vain? Meridian 157 is a point and click adventure series involving interactive puzzles and an intriguing storyline taking place over a long series of chapters. Built using state of the art rendering technology, this installment focuses on immersing players in unique and frightening environments, while allowing them to enjoy notable puzzles and engaging interactions. Try out the fully free prologue to get a taste for what the Meridian series has to offer! Features: • Custom written music to compliment the high quality visuals • All new item combine feature, supporting many different styles of play • Latest episode continuing a spooky and thrilling storyline • Challenging but • A logical hint system for some of the most difficult riddles • Available in 8 languages, including English, French, Russian, German, Chinese (Mandarin), Spanish, Portuguese, Italian and Japanese! • New colour blind mode available for people who might have trouble with colour based puzzles Follow us on Facebook and Twitter to receive all the latest news! Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NovaSoftInteractive/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/novasoftint

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Meridian 157: Chapter 1
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → Free [Free ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Chapter 2 has been officially released! Get it now on the App Store! While searching for the anomaly, you find yourself trapped inside a facility on a remote sub-Arctic island. What is this place? Who built it? Why was it left abandoned? Explore the uninhabited complex you now find yourself trapped in, but be warned: you might not be as alone as you think... Inspired by classic point and click games, Meridian 157: Chapter 1 is the next installment in this new and exciting adventure series. Play as David Zander, a forensic meteorologist who took it upon himself to investigate a strange weather anomaly off the coast of Alaskan. Find clues, solve puzzles and investigate the mystery to progress further into the island and uncover the truth behind the secret of the 157th meridian... Whatever that may be... We recommend that you play the free prologue if you haven't done so already Features: • Custom soundtrack and sound effects designed for a creepy in-game atmosphere • Latest episode continuing a spooky and thrilling storyline • Hard and clever puzzles • A logical hint system for some of the most difficult riddles • Available in 9 languages, including English, French, Russian, German, Chinese (Mandarin), Spanish, Portuguese, Italian and Japanese! • New colour blind mode available for people who might have trouble with colour based puzzles Follow us on Facebook and Twitter to receive all the latest news! Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NovaSoftInteractive/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/novasoftint

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$1.99 → $0.69 [$0.69 ~ $2.99]
  • Yearly Subscription：$14.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $24.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$0.69
  • Yearly Subscription：$6.99
  • Pro – Lifetime：$0.00
  • Premium Lifetime：$29.99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration. Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1 Terms of Use (EULA): Apple App Store https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Infinity Tank Battle
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → Free [Free ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Golden Pass：$1.99
  • 200 Tickets：$4.99
  • 50 Tickets：$1.99
  • 500 Tickets：$9.99

Application Description

Tank Battle is very popular TV game since 8-bit console present. From 2012, we develop "Super Tank Battle" and provide 500 maps to player. Many people play it day by day. Now we using a new game engine to offer new game "Infinity Tank Battle". Infinity Tank Battle is a brand new tank battle game. It is following various classic essential features, and add some new interesting elements. Core Game Rule: - Defence your base - Destroy all enemy tanks Key Features: - Different type of enemy - Different type of Map style - Special items - Auto Helper tank - Import Super Tank Battle 500 Legend maps Infinity Tank Battle will continue update, our target is over 1000 map. And this game is cross-platform, you can find it on mobile, PC, and Mac.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
